en: Give me the gun. You know, you go to the district attorney
ko: Give me the gun. You know, you go to the district attorney

en: and you explain to him that my nephew's gun was yours.
ko: 그리고 그에게 내 조카가 사라졌다고 설명해 줘.
ja: 甥がいなくなったと説明してくれ
zhTW: 然後你跟他解釋我姪子走了
vi: Và anh giải thích cho anh ta rằng cháu tôi đã đi rồi
